parameters.description: Ids to be removed from territory

get.description: Return a specific user in a territory.

put.description: Add a specific user to a territory.

delete.description: Remove a specific user from a territory.

scopes.ZohoCRM.users.ALL: Full access to user resources (read/write) within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.territories.ALL: Full access to territories settings (read/write) within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.users.READ: Read-only access to user resources within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.territories.READ: Read-only access to territories settings within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.users.UPDATE: Update access to user resources within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.territories.UPDATE: Update access to territories settings within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.users.DELETE: Delete access to user resources within Zoho CRM
scopes.ZohoCRM.settings.territories.DELETE: Delete access to territories settings within Zoho CRM

User.description: Schema representing a user in Zoho CRM.

created_time.description: When the user account was created.

Modified_By.description: User who last modified this account.

Modified_Time.description: When the user account was last modified.

microsoft.description: Whether user has Microsoft integration enabled.

sandboxDeveloper.description: Whether user is a sandbox developer.

personal_account.description: Whether this is a personal account.

confirm.description: Whether user has confirmed their account.

UserInvalidErrorSchemaOnRequestBody.title: Territory Error Response
UserInvalidErrorSchemaOnRequestBody.description: Schema for error responses returned during territory creation or update.

users.description: List of territories with their validation or processing status.

code.description: Error or status code representing the outcome of the request.

details.description: Additional contextual information about the error or status.

api_name.description: The API field name associated with the validation error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the field that caused the issue.

id.description: The unique identifier related to the error context.

resource_path_index.description: Index in the resource path where the error occurred.

dependee.description: Dependency information related to the error.

api_name.description: The API field name of the dependee.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the field that caused the issue.

resource_path_index.description: Index in the resource path where the dependee is located.

owner_status.description: The status of the owner being added to the territory.

message.description: Detailed error message to help fix the validation issue.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation failed or succeeded.
